hero.description: Experience the speed of HOP. We provide tech-driven transport solutions that are fast, secure, and fully transparent.

sectors.subtitle: Specialized logistics solutions designed for each industry sector with precision and reliability.

messe.title: Messe & Event
messe.desc: We provide fast and secure transport of exhibition equipment, event materials, and stage systems directly to event locations with high precision and timing.

construction.title: Construction
construction.desc: We deliver construction equipment and building materials directly to the specified site with high speed, safety, and reliability.

documents.title: Documents & Packages
documents.desc: Secure and fast delivery of documents and packages with full tracking and guaranteed confidentiality.

retailers.title: Retailers & Wholesalers
retailers.desc: Smart logistics solutions for retailers and wholesalers including warehousing, distribution, and last-mile delivery.

autoparts.title: Autoparts & Automotive
autoparts.desc: Professional transport of vehicles, spare parts, and automotive components with full protection and optimized routes.

services.road_desc: Fast FTL/LTL across Europe with AI-optimized routes.
services.express_desc: Time-critical shipments delivered in record time.
services.parcel_desc: Flexible door-to-door options for any package size.
services.docs_desc: Expert handling of customs and legal documentation.
services.secure_desc: Total cargo protection and real-time risk management.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent rates with no hidden fees.
pricing.mini_desc: Perfect for small or occasional shipments.

courier.name: Courier Service
courier.desc: Fast door-to-door delivery for small packages and documents.

ftl.name: Full Truckload
ftl.desc: Dedicated trucks for large-volume and high-priority cargo.

footer.description: Next-generation logistics for the fast-paced world. HOP your freight anywhere in Europe with total confidence.

carousel.title: Smart Transport Solutions
carousel.description: We provide fast, flexible, and reliable logistics services for all types of cargo.

contact.subtitle: Fill in the details below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.success_message: We have received your request and will contact you very soon.
contact.error_message: Failed to send message, please try again.

about.p1: HOP Logistics and Transport is a modern logistics partner focused on smart flexible and personalized transport solutions.
about.p2: We act as the bridge between clients and transport providers simplifying shipping through efficient coordination and trusted connections.
about.p3: Whether by road sea or air we move every shipment with care clarity and smart planning. At HOP every move is a smart move.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We make shipping simple and smart. HOP connects clients with the right transport solutions through personal service smart planning and trusted partnerships.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become a trusted logistics partner known for smart solutions personal service and seamless transport across every route.

smart_moves.title: Smart Moves
smart_moves.desc: We choose the smartest solutions not just the fastest

personal_service.title: Personal Service
personal_service.desc: Every client receives dedicated attention and direct communication

trust.title: Trust and Transparency
trust.desc: Clarity and confidence at every step of the shipment process

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: We keep our promises and strictly adhere to deadlines

flexibility.title: Flexibility
flexibility.desc: We provide tailored solutions for every client and every cargo
